groups.name: springdoc.redoc
groups.description: Configuration properties for the Redoc API documentation UI.

properties.name: springdoc.redoc.enabled
properties.description: Whether the Redoc UI endpoint is enabled.

properties.name: springdoc.redoc.path
properties.description: The URL path where the Redoc UI is served.

properties.name: springdoc.redoc.spec-url
properties.description: The URL of the OpenAPI specification to render.

properties.name: springdoc.redoc.title
properties.description: The HTML page title for the Redoc documentation page.

properties.name: springdoc.redoc.use-cdn
properties.description: Whether to load the Redoc JS from a CDN instead of the bundled version.

properties.name: springdoc.redoc.cdn-url
properties.description: The CDN URL for the Redoc standalone JS file. Used only when use-cdn is true.

properties.name: springdoc.redoc.font-url
properties.description: Google Fonts (or any web font provider) URL for loading custom fonts. Defaults to Inter + JetBrains Mono. Set to empty string to disable.

properties.name: springdoc.redoc.disable-search
properties.description: When true, disables search indexing and hides the search box.

properties.name: springdoc.redoc.hide-download-buttons
properties.description: When true, hides the 'Download' button for saving the API definition source file.

properties.name: springdoc.redoc.sort-required-props-first
properties.description: When true, displays required properties first in schemas.

properties.name: springdoc.redoc.expand-responses
properties.description: Controls which responses to expand by default. Use comma-separated codes (e.g. '200,201') or 'all'.

properties.name: springdoc.redoc.path-in-middle-panel
properties.description: When true, displays the path link and HTTP verb in the middle panel.

properties.name: springdoc.redoc.hide-hostname
properties.description: When true, hides the hostname in the operation definition.

properties.name: springdoc.redoc.hide-loading
properties.description: When true, hides the loading animation.

properties.name: springdoc.redoc.native-scrollbars
properties.description: When true, uses native browser scrollbars instead of custom ones.

properties.name: springdoc.redoc.json-samples-expand-level
properties.description: Sets the default expand level for JSON payload samples. Use a number or 'all'.

properties.name: springdoc.redoc.theme
properties.description: JSON string for Redoc theme configuration. Overrides the default Inter + JetBrains Mono font theme.
